tagline: You Dream It, We Make It Happen

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built to
Last a Lifetime
hero.subheadline: From custom gunite pools to weekly maintenance, EverClear has been turning New Jersey backyards into family retreats for over 16 years. Award-winning design, certified technicians, and a 4.8-star reputation you can trust.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Experts From<br class="hidden md:block"> Design to Maintenance
services.subtitle: Whether you are dreaming of a brand-new custom pool or need reliable weekly care, EverClear handles every step so you can focus on making memories.

cards.title: Custom Gunite Pools
cards.description: Unlimited shapes, superior durability, and a design built around your vision. Our award-winning gunite pools are engineered to last decades.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Resurfacing, new tile, coping replacement, and complete renovations. We breathe new life into aging pools and transform them into showpieces.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks every week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Seamlessly integrated spas and standalone hot tubs designed for year-round relaxation. The perfect complement to any backyard retreat.

cards.title: Pool Decking & Landscape
cards.description: Premium deck materials and integrated landscape design that frame your pool in style. Safe, beautiful, and built for outdoor living.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Heaters, pumps, filters, salt systems, and automation. Fast diagnosis, expert repair, and professional installation to keep everything running.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us your vision. We visit your property, discuss your goals, and deliver a detailed proposal with transparent pricing. No pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our certified team handles every detail — permits, excavation, construction, and finishing. You get clear communication and progress updates at every milestone.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your finished pool is ready for the family. And with our ongoing maintenance plans, it stays crystal clear season after season while you simply enjoy it.

about.label: Why NJ Families Choose EverClear
about.headline: Award-Winning Craftsmanship, Family-First Service
about.description: Founded by Jason Werner in 2010, EverClear Pools & Spas has grown from a local Passaic County operation into one of New Jersey's most decorated pool contractors. With NESPA Outstanding Achievement Awards, Best of Houzz honors, and an A+ BBB rating, our reputation is built on relationships — not just pools. Every team member is CPO-certified and OSHA-trained, and we treat your backyard like our own.

features.title: Award-Winning Builder
features.description: NESPA Outstanding Achievement Awards from 2017-2024, Best of Houzz, and Angi Super Service recognition year after year.

features.title: Bilingual Team Available
features.description: Our team serves English and Spanish-speaking families with the same care, clarity, and professionalism throughout every project.

features.title: Transparent Communication
features.description: From the first consultation to the final walkthrough, you know exactly what is happening, when it is happening, and what it costs. No surprises.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed proposal with transparent costs. Financing options available to fit your budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will come back to make it right at no additional cost. For new construction, our workmanship warranty ensures your investment is protected for years to come. We have built our reputation on standing behind every pool we touch.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom gunite pools take 8-12 weeks from groundbreaking to first splash, depending on the complexity of the design and permitting timelines. We provide a detailed construction schedule upfront so you always know what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We partner with trusted lenders to offer flexible financing options that fit a range of budgets. During your free consultation, we can walk you through available plans and help you find the right fit.

faqs.question: What areas in New Jersey do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Passaic County and surrounding areas including Paterson, Alpine, Wyckoff, Saddle River, Franklin Lakes, Hewitt, Mendham, Clifton, and more. If you are in northern New Jersey, chances are we cover your area.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool maintenance after construction?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer comprehensive weekly maintenance plans including chemical balancing, cleaning, equipment checks, and seasonal openings and closings. Many of our build clients become lifelong maintenance customers.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified and insured?
faqs.answer: Every EverClear technician is a Certified Pool & Spa Operator with OSHA safety training. We carry full liability insurance and are a BBB A+ Accredited Business. Your family's safety is our top priority.

testimonials.name: Terry G.
testimonials.text: Thomas and Justin came today to clean up after the pool's opening. They were fabulous. Started work right away, were pleasant and professional and my pool is absolutely clean.

testimonials.name: Long-Term Customer
testimonials.text: We have been using Everclear for 3 years and cannot say enough great things about them, from office staff like Melynda and Mary to team members like Ricky. Their quality of work and customer service is outstanding.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Jesus, Eric and Charles did a phenomenal job winterizing and closing our pool. I would recommend this crew and company for any future services. Professional and thorough from start to finish.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from our award-winning team. We respond within 24 hours and can schedule your consultation this week.
